---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for the streaming pipeline
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem would this feature solve, or what use case would it enable? Is your
request related to a limitation you ran into?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected Component

Which part of the pipeline would this touch?

- [ ] Sensor simulator (`scripts/sensor_simulator.py`)
- [ ] Kafka broker / topic
- [ ] Spark transformation job (`scripts/spark_transform.py`)
- [ ] Redis TimeSeries sink
- [ ] Grafana dashboard / provisioning
- [ ] Docker Compose / infrastructure
- [ ] Tests / CI / tooling
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
